zh.lifeSummary: 當Reginald Crawford於1253年出生在蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度時，他的父親Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun33歲，母親Alicia de Dalsallock23歲。他於大約1268年與Cecilia Jorgenson在蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度結婚。他們至少是4個兒子的父母。他去世於1297年在他的家鄉享年44歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭艾斯爾盧度。

zh-hans.Lough Carmen, Wexford, Leinster, Ireland: 爱尔兰庫迪 懷可福德洛
zh-hans.Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United: 英国苏格兰雷福福爾格林可
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Reginald Crawford于1253年出生在苏格兰艾斯爾盧度时，他的父亲Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun33岁，母亲Alicia de Dalsallock23岁。他于大约1268年与Cecilia Jorgenson在苏格兰艾斯爾盧度结婚。他们至少是4个儿子的父母。他去世于1297年在他的家乡享年44岁，埋葬在苏格兰艾斯爾盧度。

nameMeanings.name: Crawford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish and English: habitational name from any of various places called Crawford, primarily the one in Lanarkshire (Scotland), and possibly also from the one in Lancashire. Both are named in Old English with crāwe ‘crow’ + ford ‘ford’.

variants.name: Crafford
meanings: English (Cumberland) and Scottish: variant of   Crawford  .

variants.name: Crofoot
meanings: English: variant ofCrowfoot, a nickname for someone with splayed feet or someother deformity of the foot, from Old English crāwe ‘crow’ +fōt ‘foot’. In Middle English crou-fot also denotedthe buttercup, and it may be from this sense that the name arose,although the reason for its adoption is unclear.

variants.name: Crofut
meanings: Scottish and English: variant of Crawford or Crowfoot (see Crofoot ).

nameMeanings.name: Reginald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Norman origin, derived from Reginaldus, a Latinized form of Reynold influenced by Latin regina ‘queen’. The full form is now regarded as very formal, and bearers generally shorten it to Reg in ordinary usage.

en.lifeSummary: When Reginald Crawford was born in 1253, in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, his father, Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun, was 33 and his mother, Alicia de Dalsallock, was 23. He married Cecilia Jorgenson about 1268, in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons. He died in 1297, in his hometown, at the age of 44, and was buried in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Reginald Crawford est né en 1253, à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse, son père, Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Alicia de Dalsallock, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Cecilia Jorgenson environ 1268, à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils. Il est décédé en 1297, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterré à Loudoun, Ayrshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Reginald Crawford 1253 in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun 33 und seine Mutter Alicia de Dalsallock 23. Er hat um 1268 in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland Cecilia Jorgenson geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne. Er starb 1297 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald Crawford è nato il nel 1253 nel Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, il suo padre, Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun, aveva 33 anni e il suo madre, Alicia de Dalsallock, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Cecilia Jorgenson circa 1268, nel Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli. Morì nel 1297, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni, e fu sepolto a Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ja.Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland: スコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウン

ja.lifeSummary: Reginald Crawfordが1253年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンで生まれた時，父Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudounは33歳，母Alicia de Dalsallockは23歳であった。約1268年にスコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンでCecilia Jorgensonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子の親であった。彼は1297年に故郷で44歳で死去し，スコットランドエイルシュアイアロウドウンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Reginald Crawford(이)가 1253년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 루다운에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 Alicia de Dalsallock(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1268년 스컷랜드 에이르실르 루다운에서 Cecilia Jorgenson(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1297년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 에이르실르 루다운에 묻혔다.

mn.Greenock, Renfrewshire, Scotland, United: Graenag, Siorrachd Rinn Friù, Шотланд, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Reginald Crawford nasceu em 1253, em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, seu pai, Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Alicia de Dalsallock, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecilia Jorgenson aproximadamente 1268, em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1297, em sua cidade natal, com 44 anos, e foi sepultado em Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Reginald Crawford родился в 1253 г. в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Alicia de Dalsallock, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecilia Jorgenson около 1268 г. в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына. Он умер в 1297 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет и был похоронен в местности лоудоун, аиршир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Reginald Crawford nació en 1253, en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland, su papá, Hugh Crawford 5th Laird of Loudoun, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Alicia de Dalsallock, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Cecilia Jorgenson aproximadamente 1268, en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos. Murió en 1297, en su pueblo, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultado en Loudoun, Ayrshire, Scotland.
